text: I feel a quiet curiosity. The first room seems transitional, expectant, as if awaiting people or events to bring it to life. Entering the second space, I am confronted by the vibrant display of research and development; the bold letters and informative screens invite contemplation. Here, surrounded by echoes of innovation, I ponder the relationship between human creativity and technology, and I am reminded of the ever-evolving nature of knowledge and connection.
